title: mentha × dalmatica f. thuringiaca
intro: Mentha × dalmatica f. thuringiaca, also known as Thuringian mint or Berg mint, is a subspecies of mint native to Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a digestive aid, relax muscles, and reduce inflammation due to its high content of menthol and menthone. The health benefits of Mentha × dalmatica f. thuringiaca include relief from nausea, headaches, and sore muscles, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
